summary: Add CockroachDB-backed user and Stripe subscription state synced by a verified Stripe webhook.
created_for: Set up Stripe billing state, receive low-noise webhooks, and show free or paid status on the dashboard.

review_items.summary: Add local users keyed by Appwrite user id with cached plan status.
Add Stripe customer cache linked to local users.
Add latest Stripe subscription state used to determine free or paid dashboard status.
Add Stripe event receipt log for idempotent webhook handling.
Create CockroachDB tables and indexes for users and Stripe billing sync.

patches.value: route policy includes billing status and Stripe webhook routes

review_items.summary: Dashboard requests a verified server status check and displays free or paid billing state with local SQL user profile data.
/api/billing/status returns the verified local SQL user profile alongside plan status so the dashboard General section can use server-derived account data.

patches.value: billing status response includes planStatus, stripeCustomerId, and local user profile fields

review_items.summary: Add /api/billing/checkout to create a Stripe-hosted subscription Checkout Session for verified Appwrite users.

patches.value: checkout route verifies Appwrite JWT, upserts local SQL user, creates Stripe Checkout Session, and returns URL
page routes include /billing/checkout client-side checkout launcher

review_items.summary: AuthContext exposes startCheckout so authenticated UI can request a server-created Stripe Checkout URL.

patches.value: auth context policy includes server-verified checkout start action

review_items.summary: Prevent repeated automatic billing status requests after a status API failure and show a manual retry control.

patches.value: dashboard policy includes no automatic retry loop after billing status failure

review_items.summary: Only paid users may render the web dashboard; free or unverified billing states redirect to the pricing page.

patches.value: dashboard policy gates content on verified paid billing status

review_items.summary: Temporarily include bounded billing status endpoint error details in 500 responses and render them on the dashboard for production debugging.

patches.value: dashboard temporarily displays bounded endpoint error details

review_items.summary: Enable Stripe-hosted promotion code entry on Pro Checkout Sessions.

patches.value: checkout flow allows Stripe-managed promotion code entry

security_data_rules: Stripe webhook requests must verify the Stripe-Signature header against STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET before processing.
Billing status API requests must verify the caller's Appwrite JWT before reading or writing user billing state.
Temporary billing status debug errors must remain bounded and must be removed after production diagnosis.
Checkout API requests must verify the caller's Appwrite JWT and must not accept client-provided price IDs or redirect domains.
Dashboard content must only render after verified billing status returns paid; free and unverified states must see pricing instead.
Stripe raw event payloads are not stored; only latest relevant Stripe object JSON and low-noise event processing metadata are retained.

cross_project_impact.compatibility_notes: No other project consumes the billing routes or CockroachDB schema yet.
